Register Custom Platform

Source: R/platforms.R
register_custom_platform.Rd

Adds support for a custom microarray platform

register_custom_platform(
  platform_id,
  platform_name,
  manufacturer,
  organism,
  probe_id_pattern = NULL
)

Arguments

platform_id

Platform identifier

platform_name

Platform name

manufacturer

Manufacturer name

organism

Organism

probe_id_pattern

Regex pattern for probe IDs

Value

Invisible NULL

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
  register_custom_platform(
    platform_id = "GPL_CUSTOM",
    platform_name = "Custom Array v1",
    manufacturer = "CustomCo",
    organism = "Homo sapiens",
    probe_id_pattern = "^CUST_\\d+$"
  )
} # }
